alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a naphthalene moiety, which bears a carboxylic acid group or a derivative at one or more positions. Naphthalene is a bicyclic compound that is made up of two fused benzene ring.
alternative_parents.name: Naphthalenecarboxylic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organosilicon compounds with the general formula RO[Si](R')(OR'')OR''' (R-R''' = aliphatic organyl group).
alternative_parents.name: Trialkoxysilanes

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a silicon atom covalently bonded to an alkoxy group. They have the general formula R1R2R3Si-O-R4 (R4 = aryl, alkyl).
alternative_parents.name: Silyl ethers

alternative_parents.description: Carboxylic acid derivatives in which the carbon atom from the carbonyl group is attached to an alkyl or an aryl moiety through an oxygen atom (forming an ester group).
alternative_parents.name: Carboxylic acid esters

alternative_parents.description: Organosilicon compounds where the tetravalent silicon atom is linked to one or more heteroatoms.
alternative_parents.name: Organoheterosilanes

alternative_parents.description: Organic salt compounds containing a metalloid atom in its ionic form.
alternative_parents.name: Organic metalloid salts

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing a bond between a carbon atom and an oxygen atom.
alternative_parents.name: Organooxygen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing a system of three linearly fused benzene rings.
class.name: Anthracenes

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as anthracenecarboxylic acids. These are organic compounds containing a carboxylic acid group attached to an anthracene ring system.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing a carboxylic acid group attached to an anthracene ring system.
direct_parent.name: Anthracenecarboxylic acids

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic compounds containing a carboxylic acid group (or a derivative thereof) attached to an anthracene ring system.
subclass.name: Anthracenecarboxylic acids and derivatives

superclass.description: Aromatic compounds containing one or more benzene rings.
superclass.name: Benzenoids
